title: ‘I make my own pizza’: What’s the best way you’ve found to save money?
summary: MarketWatch explores personal money-saving strategies beyond homemade pizza, including cost-cutting in coffee, cooking, cleaning, and vacations. The article highlights practical everyday choices that contribute to overall financial wellness.
content: “Saving money doesn’t have to be about pizza — it could be coffee, cooking, cleaning, vacations, or anything else.”

zh.title: "我自己做披萨"：你找到的最好的省钱方式是什么？
zh.summary: MarketWatch 探索了除自制披萨外的个人省钱策略，包括削减咖啡、烹饪、清洁和度假的成本。该文章突出了有助于整体财务健康的实际日常选择。

title: Micron’s stock falls as investors wonder if the memory market is near the top
summary: Micron's stock declined as investors grow cautious about whether the memory chip market is approaching its peak. Analyst commentary suggests hesitance related to artificial intelligence demand trends.
content: “Most investor feedback continues to point to a skittish AI tape,” one analyst said.

zh.title: 美光股票下跌，投资者担心内存市场是否接近顶峰
zh.summary: 美光股票下跌，投资者对内存芯片市场是否正在接近峰值感到谨慎。分析师评论表明对人工智能需求趋势的犹豫。

title: We’re spending $7,000 to attend 7 weddings this year — and that’s after cutting corners
summary: One person's account reveals the rising costs of wedding attendance, spending $7,000 for seven events even after cost-cutting efforts. The article also addresses etiquette for politely declining wedding invitations.
content: Plus: How to decline a wedding invitation without feeling like a jerk

zh.title: 我们今年花费 7,000 美元参加 7 场婚礼——而这已经是削减成本之后了
zh.summary: 一个人的账户显示了婚礼出席成本的上升，即使在削减成本的努力后，七场活动也花费了 7,000 美元。该文章还解决了礼貌地拒绝婚礼邀请的礼仪问题。

title: Online gamblers betting more than £1,000 to face new checks
summary: UK financial regulators are implementing mandatory assessment checks for online gamblers placing bets exceeding £1,000 in a 24-hour period. The measure aims to identify and mitigate problem gambling risks.
content: Punters who bet more than £1,000 online in a 24-hour window will have to undergo an assessment, the regulator says.

zh.title: 在线赌徒投注超过1000英镑将面临新的检查
zh.summary: 英国金融监管机构正在实施强制性评估检查，针对在24小时内投注超过1000英镑的在线赌徒。该措施旨在识别和减轻问题赌博风险。

title: SpaceX wins wild praise, with one analyst going so far as to predict a 400% stock surge
summary: Wall Street analysts are expressing strong bullish sentiment on SpaceX, with some predicting substantial upside potential including forecasts of 400% stock appreciation. The enthusiasm reflects confidence in the company's growth prospects.
content: Wall Street is using colorful language as analysts cheer major upside potential for SpaceX’s stock.

zh.title: SpaceX赢得热烈赞扬，一位分析师甚至预测股价将飙升400%
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师对SpaceX表达了强劲的看涨情绪，一些人预测巨大的上升潜力，包括股价升值400%的预测。这种热情反映了对该公司增长前景的信心。

title: Trump renews Greenland threats at NATO summit, says U.S. could remove troops from Europe
summary: Trump renewed demands for U.S. acquisition of Greenland and threatened potential troop withdrawal from Europe during a NATO summit. The statements continue a pattern of tension regarding U.S. military commitments and geopolitical strategy.
content: NATO fell into a crisis earlier this year as Trump demanded that the U.S. must take control of Greenland on national security grounds.

zh.title: 特朗普在北约峰会上重申对格陵兰的威胁，表示美国可能撤出欧洲军队
zh.summary: 特朗普在北约峰会期间重新提出美国收购格陵兰的要求，并威胁可能从欧洲撤出军队。这些声明延续了关于美国军事承诺和地缘政治战略的紧张局势模式。

title: Only one SpaceX analyst out of all the bulls Tuesday is calling for the stock to drop. Here's why
summary: MoffettNathanson initiated SpaceX research coverage with a neutral rating and $131 price target, implying 18% downside—a contrarian view among predominantly bullish analysts. The analysis suggests caution amid widespread market optimism.
content: MoffettNathanson initiated research coverage of SpaceX with a neutral rating and a $131 price target, implying 18% downside from the stock's latest close.

zh.title: 众多看多分析师中仅有一位SpaceX分析师看空该股。原因在这里
zh.summary: MoffettNathanson以中立评级和131美元目标价启动SpaceX研究覆盖，暗示下跌18%——在主要看多的分析师中属于逆向观点。该分析建议在广泛的市场乐观情绪中保持谨慎。

title: Trump ally Nigel Farage quits UK parliament amid finance scandal to fight special election
summary: Reform U.K. leader Nigel Farage resigned his parliamentary seat amid finance scandal and announced plans to contest the resulting by-election. The move triggers a special election in the Clacton constituency.
content: Reform U.K. leader Nigel Farage has quit as MP for Clacton, forcing a by-election that he has said he will fight.

zh.title: 特朗普盟友法拉奇因财务丑闻辞去英国议会席位，参加补选
zh.summary: 英国改革党领导人奈杰尔·法拉奇因财务丑闻辞去议会席位，并宣布计划参加随之而来的补选。此举在克拉克顿选区引发了一次特殊选举。

title: Amazon raising at least $25 billion in bond sale, won't issue more debt in 2026
summary: Amazon is raising at least $25 billion through a bond sale to fund substantial artificial intelligence investments, with a commitment to avoid additional debt issuance in 2026. The move reflects the company's prioritization of AI infrastructure spending.
content: It marks Amazon's latest debt raise as it looks to buttress its massive investments in artificial intelligence.

zh.title: 亚马逊通过债券发行筹集至少250亿美元，2026年不再发行债务
zh.summary: 亚马逊通过债券发行筹集至少250亿美元，用于资助大规模人工智能投资，并承诺在2026年不发行额外债务。此举反映了该公司对人工智能基础设施支出的优先重视。

title: Rivian stock falls more than 10% as company sells 75 million shares to raise capital
summary: Rivian's stock fell more than 10% as the company sold 75 million shares to raise capital, despite recent gains of 8.1% Monday and 19.2% the prior week. The equity offering created shareholder dilution pressures.
content: The capital raise occurred during extended hours trading following Rivian shares increasing 8.1% on Monday after increasing 19.2% last week.

zh.title: Rivian股价下跌超过10%，公司出售7500万股筹集资本
zh.summary: 尽管周一上涨8.1%，前一周上涨19.2%，但Rivian股价下跌超过10%，公司出售7500万股筹集资本。该股权发行造成了股东稀释压力。

title: Billionaires John and Laura Arnold commit $2.6 million to study online sports betting risk
summary: Billionaires John and Laura Arnold, through Arnold Ventures, are committing $2.6 million to university research on potential harms of online sports betting. The investment reflects growing concerns about digital gambling expansion risks.
content: John Arnold and Laura Arnold, who run Arnold Ventures, are investing $2.6 million for university research into potential harms of online sports betting.

zh.title: 亿万富翁约翰和劳拉·阿诺德承诺260万美元研究在线体育博彩风险
zh.summary: 亿万富翁约翰和劳拉·阿诺德通过阿诺德风险投资公司承诺向大学研究在线体育博彩潜在危害投入260万美元。这项投资反映了人们对数字赌博扩张风险日益增长的担忧。

title: The trade of the year is entering a new phase, says Goldman Sachs. Here’s what it means for stocks.
summary: Goldman Sachs reports that the HALO trade, which has performed well in 2026, is transitioning into a more challenging phase dependent on company earnings performance. The shift signals potential changes in market dynamics and investment returns.
content: Goldman Sachs says the HALO trade has worked well this year, but a tougher phase relying on earnings performance lies ahead.

zh.title: 高盛表示今年的交易正在进入新阶段，对股票意味着什么
zh.summary: 高盛报告称，在2026年表现良好的HALO交易正在过渡到一个更具挑战性的阶段，该阶段取决于公司的盈利表现。这种转变预示着市场动态和投资回报可能会发生变化。

title: Why the stock market is taking the chip washout in stride
summary: Despite semiconductor manufacturers experiencing a difficult period, broader equity markets remain resilient and largely unaffected by chip sector weakness. The disconnect suggests investors view current chip challenges as temporary cyclical pressures rather than systemic risks.
content: Chipmakers are going through a rough patch, though you wouldn't know it just by looking at the broader market.

zh.title: 股票市场为何不为芯片行业的困境所撼
zh.summary: 尽管半导体制造商经历困难时期，更广泛的股票市场仍保持韧性，基本不受芯片行业疲软的影响。这种脱节表明投资者认为当前芯片挑战是暂时的周期性压力，而非系统性风险。

title: Major banks give their first ratings on SpaceX and they're quite bullish: 'Apex of civilizational ambition'
summary: Major investment banks released initial equity research on SpaceX following the end of IPO underwriting lockup periods, issuing bullish ratings and using optimistic language about the company's strategic importance. The coverage reflects confidence in SpaceX's growth prospects.
content: Financial underwriters of SpaceX's IPO are now free to release their equity research.

zh.title: 大型银行给SpaceX的首个评级非常看涨：'文明雄心的顶峰'
zh.summary: 主要投资银行在IPO承销锁定期结束后发布了对SpaceX的初始股权研究报告，给出了看涨评级，并用乐观措辞形容该公司的战略重要性。这份报告反映了对SpaceX增长前景的信心。

title: There's a lot of 'noise' making it harder for investors to read the true state of the stock market
summary: Market analysts note that mechanical factors including index inclusion effects, policy-driven investment flows, and options-hedging strategies are creating significant 'noise,' making it harder for investors to assess true market fundamentals. The structural complexity reflects evolving market dynamics.
content: Rarely has so much attention been placed on the mechanical impact of index inclusion, policy-driven investment flows and options-hedging impact.

zh.title: 大量'噪音'让投资者更难看清股市的真实状态
zh.summary: 市场分析师指出，指数纳入效应、政策驱动的投资流和期权对冲策略等机械性因素造成了大量'噪音'，使投资者难以准确评估市场基本面。这种结构性复杂性反映了不断演变的市场动态。

title: Chinese AI models are gaining ground with U.S. companies as OpenAI, Anthropic costs surge
summary: Chinese AI startups like DeepSeek and Z.ai are offering competitive alternatives to U.S. frontier models, gaining traction as rising costs from OpenAI and Anthropic push companies to explore options. This shift could reshape the competitive landscape in enterprise AI adoption.
content: Recent model releases from Chinese companies including DeepSeek and Z.ai are seen by many as highly competitive compared to leading U.S. frontier systems.

zh.title: 随着OpenAI和Anthropic成本飙升，中国AI模型在美国公司中获得立足点
zh.summary: 像DeepSeek和Z.ai这样的中国AI初创公司正在提供与美国前沿模型具有竞争力的替代方案，随着OpenAI和Anthropic的成本上升，推动公司探索其他选择，这一转变有望重塑企业AI采用的竞争格局。

title: SpaceX’s two lead underwriters have a $1 trillion chasm in their valuation as quiet period ends
summary: Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley, lead underwriters for SpaceX's IPO, have valued the company more than $1 trillion apart despite both initiating buy coverage. The valuation gap raises questions about fair pricing as SpaceX prepares to go public.
content: The two lead underwriters on SpaceX’s initial public offering, Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley, have a valuation gap of more than $1 trillion as they both initiated coverage at buy.

zh.title: 静默期结束，SpaceX的两家主要承销商在估值上存在1万亿美元的巨大差距
zh.summary: 作为SpaceX IPO的主要承销商，高盛和摩根士丹利对该公司的估值相差超过1万亿美元，尽管两家都发起了买入评级。随着SpaceX准备上市，这一估值差距引发了关于公平定价的问题。

title: Tough crowd for Samsung as record quarterly earnings brings out the sellers
summary: Samsung Electronics reported record quarterly earnings, yet shareholders responded by selling, suggesting investor concerns about future growth despite strong current performance. The disconnect between robust financials and negative market reaction indicates skepticism about the company's trajectory.
content: Samsung Electronics shareholders proved a difficult audience to please.

zh.title: 三星创纪录的季度收益未能留住卖家
zh.summary: 三星电子报告了创纪录的季度收益，但股东却通过抛售来回应，这表明尽管当前表现强劲，投资者对未来增长仍存疑虑。强劲财务数据与负面市场反应之间的脱节表明投资者对该公司前景持怀疑态度。

title: Former ‘Grey’s Anatomy’ star Katherine Heigl is selling her gorgeous Utah home for $10.6 million
summary: Katherine Heigl is listing her Utah mountain home for $10.6 million, 14 years after leaving Hollywood to pursue a quieter family lifestyle. The sale marks a potential transition from her rural retreat.
content: Katherine Heigl is selling her longtime Utah retreat 14 years after she left the Hollywood spotlight to enjoy a quieter life with her family at the extraordinary mountain home.

zh.title: 前《实习医生格蕾》明星凯瑟琳·海格尔以1060万美元出售她的华丽犹他州住宅
zh.summary: 凯瑟琳·海格尔在离开好莱坞14年后，以1060万美元的价格出列她的犹他州山区住宅，追求更加宁静的家庭生活。这笔交易标志着她从乡村度假地的潜在转变。

title: Dennis Quaid lists L.A. home for $5.2 million and makes the move to Nashville
summary: Actor Dennis Quaid is selling his Los Angeles home for $5.2 million and relocating to Nashville, choosing a different lifestyle over California's sun-soaked environment. The move reflects a broader trend of entertainment figures relocating from traditional Hollywood.
content: The sun-soaked lifestyle he was able to enjoy at the home wasn’t enough to keep Quaid tethered to California, with the actor revealing recently that he made the decision to quit Los Angeles altogether.

zh.title: 丹尼斯·奎德以520万美元出售洛杉矶住宅并搬迁至纳什维尔
zh.summary: 演员丹尼斯·奎德以520万美元出售他的洛杉矶住宅并搬迁至纳什维尔，选择了与加州阳光充沛环境不同的生活方式。这一举动反映了娱乐界人士从传统好莱坞搬迁的更广泛趋势。

title: Oil prices rise after report of Iranian attack on commercial ships in Strait of Hormuz
summary: Oil prices rose following reports of an Iranian attack on commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global shipping chokepoint. The incident heightens geopolitical tensions and concerns about supply chain disruptions.
content: Brent and U.S. crude futures rose after a report of an Iranian attack on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 伊朗袭击霍尔木兹海峡商船事件报告后油价上升
zh.summary: 在伊朗袭击霍尔木兹海峡商业船只的报告传出后，油价上升。霍尔木兹海峡是一个关键的全球运输瓶颈。这一事件加剧了地缘政治紧张局势和对供应链中断的担忧。

title: Volunteers racing to save surplus Silverstone food
summary: Community volunteers in Towcester are collecting surplus produce from the Silverstone circuit following the Grand Prix to reduce food waste. The initiative supports local food security while addressing post-event waste.
content: A Towcester community larder is collecting produce from the circuit following the Grand Prix.

zh.title: 志愿者竞相救助银石赛道剩余食物
zh.summary: 坦切斯特的社区志愿者在大奖赛后从银石赛道收集剩余农产品，以减少食物浪费。该倡议在解决赛后垃圾问题的同时支持当地粮食安全。

title: Google backs nuclear fusion startup targeting Europe’s first commercial power plant
summary: Proxima Fusion raised $468 million with backing from Google to develop Europe's first commercial nuclear fusion power plant. The investment signals growing confidence in fusion technology as a viable clean energy solution.
content: Proxima Fusion has raised $468 million as it looks to move towards commercializing the promising but infamously difficult technical challenge of nuclear fusion.

zh.title: 谷歌支持瞄准欧洲首个商业核电站的核聚变初创公司
zh.summary: Proxima Fusion在谷歌的支持下筹集了4.68亿美元，用于开发欧洲首个商业核聚变电站。这项投资表明业界对核聚变技术作为可行清洁能源方案的信心不断增强。

title: India fashion retailer Trent tumbles 11% as revenue growth disappoints
summary: Trent, one of India's largest fashion retailers, saw its stock fall over 10% after reporting weak earnings growth. The decline suggests investor concerns about consumer spending and retail sector momentum in India.
content: Shares of one of India's biggest fashion retailers, Trent, fell over 10% after the company reported weak earnings growth.

zh.title: 由于营收增长不达预期，印度时尚零售商Trent股价下跌11%
zh.summary: 印度最大的时尚零售商之一Trent在公布疲弱的收益增长后，股价下跌超过10%。该跌幅反映了投资者对印度消费支出和零售业动力的担忧。

title: E-bike injury payouts top £110m and push up insurance premiums
summary: E-bike related injury claims have surpassed £110 million in payouts, driving up insurance premiums for micromobility vehicle coverage. The rapid surge in claims over seven years highlights emerging insurance challenges from e-mobility adoption.
content: It is only seven years since the first claim over an injury from a micromobility vehicle was made.

zh.title: 电动自行车伤害赔付超过1.1亿英镑，推高保险费率
zh.summary: 电动自行车相关伤害索赔已超过1.1亿英镑，推高了微型交通工具的保险费率。七年来索赔的快速激增凸显了电动出行采用中出现的新保险挑战。

title: Samsung profits jump 1,800% as AI boom drives chip sales
summary: Samsung's profits surged 1,800% driven by strong AI chip demand, though shares fell as investors anticipated even higher returns. The disconnect highlights how elevated expectations around AI semiconductors are affecting market sentiment.
content: Samsung's shares fell sharply on Tuesday as some investors expected its profits to have been even higher.

zh.title: 三星利润激增1800%，AI芯片销售蓬勃发展
zh.summary: 三星利润因强劲的AI芯片需求而激增1800%，但由于投资者预期更高的回报，股价下跌。这种不匹配突显了围绕AI半导体的过高预期如何影响市场情绪。

title: BlackRock says the China AI play is stock-specific, not a regional trade
summary: BlackRock Investment Institute stated that AI-related investment opportunities in China are driven by specific stock picks rather than representing a broader regional trade. The commentary weighs into ongoing debate about whether AI valuations reflect genuine growth or speculative dynamics.
content: BlackRock Investment Institute laid out its views Monday on the AI bubble debate.

zh.title: 贝莱德表示中国AI投资是特定股票，而非地区性交易
zh.summary: 贝莱德投资研究所表示，中国与AI相关的投资机会由特定股票选择驱动，而不是代表更广泛的地区性交易。这一评论加入了关于AI估值是否反映真正增长或投机动态的持续辩论。

title: World Cup in photos: Belgium beats U.S. 4-1 after Balogun controversy, Ronaldo exits
summary: The U.S. was eliminated from the World Cup after a 4-1 loss to Belgium in the Round of 16, with the match marred by controversy over Folarin Balogun's suspended red card. Ronaldo's tournament exit marks the end of another World Cup campaign for the veteran star.
content: The U.S. is out of the World Cup, losing 4-1 to Belgium in the Round of 16 in a match blemished by suspension of Folarin Balogun's red card. Ronaldo exits.

zh.title: 世界杯图集：比利时4-1击败美国，巴洛冈争议后罗纳尔多退场
zh.summary: 美国在16强中以1-4输给比利时后被淘汰出世界杯，比赛因Folarin Balogun暂停红牌争议而蒙上阴影。罗纳尔多的锦标赛退场标志着这位老将另一场世界杯征程的结束。

title: Trump heads to Turkey as NATO is strained by Russian attacks, U.S. impatience
summary: Trump is traveling to Turkey as NATO faces mounting pressure from Russian military actions and U.S. demands for greater burden-sharing. His visit comes amid ongoing tensions over Trump's criticism of NATO members for not supporting U.S. operations in the Middle East.
content: Trump frequently vented about NATO members' refusal to heed U.S. calls for help clearing the Strait of Hormuz during its campaign against Iran.

zh.title: 特朗普前往土耳其，北约因俄罗斯攻击和美国不耐烦而紧张
zh.summary: 特朗普正前往土耳其，北约面临俄罗斯军事行动和美国要求提高负担分担的压力。他的访问正值特朗普批评北约成员国不支持美国在中东行动的紧张局势期间。

title: Hanwha Ocean shares sink 23% as it loses bid to build Canada's next fleet of submarines
summary: Hanwha Ocean's stock plummeted 23% after losing a major Canadian submarine contract to Germany's Thyssenkrupp Marine Systems. The loss represents a significant setback for the South Korean defense contractor's international expansion efforts.
content: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney announced Monday that Germany's Thyssenkrupp Marine Systems would be the preferred supplier for delivering the submarines.

zh.title: 韩华海洋股价下跌23%，未能赢得加拿大下一代潜艇舰队建造合同
zh.summary: 韩华海洋在失去德国蒂森克虏伯海洋系统公司争夺的加拿大潜艇大合同后，股价暴跌23%。这一损失对这家韩国防务承包商的国际扩张努力造成了重大挫折。

title: Samsung Electronics sees record preliminary 2Q profit but shares fall
summary: Samsung Electronics reported record preliminary second-quarter profits, yet its stock declined in market reaction. The disconnect between strong financial results and share price weakness may reflect investor concerns about future growth or profit sustainability.

zh.title: 三星电子录得创纪录的第二季度初步利润，但股价下跌
zh.summary: 三星电子报告了创纪录的初步第二季度利润，但其股价在市场反应中下跌。强劲财务业绩与股价疲软之间的脱节可能反映了投资者对未来增长或利润可持续性的担忧。

title: Stock futures are little changed after Dow tops 53,000 for first time: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock futures showed minimal movement as the Dow Jones Industrial Average crossed 53,000 for the first time following a strong Wall Street trading session. The muted futures action suggests consolidation after the historic milestone.
content: Monday night's action follows a winning session on Wall Street.

zh.title: 道琼斯指数首次突破5.3万点后，美股期货涨跌互现：实时更新
zh.summary: 美国股指期货走势平稳，道琼斯工业平均指数在华尔街交易强劲后首次突破5.3万点。期货市场反应平淡，暗示在这个历史性里程碑之后市场处于整理阶段。

title: Trump calls Walmart ‘patriotic’ for cutting beef prices — in a stark change of tune
summary: President Trump praised Walmart as "patriotic" for reducing beef prices, marking a dramatic reversal from his previous criticism of the retailer's tariff responses. The shift highlights Trump's focus on consumer price pressures and willingness to publicly acknowledge corporate actions aligned with his priorities.
content: The president hasn’t always approved of Walmart’s moves, having criticized the chain’s response to tariffs last year.

zh.title: 特朗普称沃尔玛因降低牛肉价格"爱国"——态度完全转变
zh.summary: 特朗普总统称赞沃尔玛因降低牛肉价格是"爱国"行为，这标志着他对这家零售商关税反应的批评的180度转变。这一转变突显了特朗普对消费者价格压力的关注，以及他愿意公开肯定与其优先事项相符的企业行动。
